title: tournefortia caeciliana
intro: Tournefortia caeciliana, also known as the False Lantana or Pali, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its chemical composition of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tournefortia caeciliana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional folk medicine, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
